stemHtml: Which of the following best describes the intertropical convergence zone?

options.a: The zone where cold fronts form in the tropics.
options.b: The zone where the west winds meet the subtropical high pressure belt.
options.c: The zone where the trade winds of the northern hemisphere meet those of the southern hemisphere.
options.d: The zone where the Harmattan meets the north-easterly trade winds over Africa.
